choices.label: Muri smaller dan lumina; columellae overal in fasecontrast; brochi tot 2,5(3,0) µm.

outcome.text:
23.12.2 *Lupinus*

PForml *L. polyphyllus* 1,33–1,57; *L. nootkatensis* 1,16–1,50. Polarvelden middelgroot (PFeldI 0,27–0,46). Exine ca. 1,5 µm. Brochi tot 2,5(3,0) µm.

*Lupinus polyphyllus* LINDL. (3)
32,5–38,3 µm, MiW 35,5 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Lupinus nootkatensis* DONN. (1)
30,5–37,0 µm, MiW 33,3 µm; 50 PK, 0a
